name: definition
details:
{"depends_on": ["public.ratings", "public.trips", "public.users"], "check_option": "NONE", "is_updatable": "YES", "definition_length": 580, "definition_preview": " SELECT id AS user_id,
    role,
    COALESCE(( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM trips t
          WHERE ((t.user_id = u.id) AND ((t.status)::text = 'completed'::text))), (0)::bigint) AS completed_trips_as_user,
    COALESCE(( SELECT count(*) AS count
           FROM trips t
          WHERE ((t.driver_id = u.id) AND ((t.status)::text = 'completed'::text))), (0)::bigint) AS completed_trips_as_driver,
    COALESCE(( SELECT round(avg(r.rating), 2) AS round
           FROM ratings r
          WHERE (r.driver_id = u.id)), (0)::numeric) AS computed_rating
   FROM users u;", "is_insertable_into": "YES"}

{"oid": "20215", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public._fn_recalculate_driver_rating()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  UPDATE users
  SET    rating     = (
           SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating)::NUMERIC, 2)
           FROM   ratings r
           WHERE  r.driver_id = NEW.driver_id
         ),
         updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE  id = NEW.driver_id;

  RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
  -- Upsert pricing_config when vehicle_types pricing changes

  ON CONFLICT (vehicle_type) DO UPDATE

  RETURN NEW;
END;

{"oid": "20213", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public._fn_update_total_trips_on_complete()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  -- Only act on status change ‚Üí completed
  IF NEW.status = 'completed' AND OLD.status <> 'completed' THEN
    -- Rider
    UPDATE users
    SET    total_trips = COALESCE(total_trips, 0) + 1,
           updated_at  = NOW()
    WHERE  id = NEW.user_id;

    -- Driver (if assigned)
    IF NEW.driver_id IS NOT NULL THEN
      UPDATE users
      SET    total_trips = COALESCE(total_trips, 0) + 1,
             updated_at  = NOW()
      WHERE  id = NEW.driver_id;
    END IF;
  END IF;

  RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

{"oid": "26190", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.admin_wallet_top_up(p_wallet_id uuid, p_amount numeric, p_description text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_admin_email text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_before numeric;
  v_after numeric;
BEGIN
  IF p_amount IS NULL OR p_amount <= 0 OR p_amount > 100000 THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'invalid amount';
  END IF;

  SELECT balance INTO v_before
  FROM public.user_wallets
  WHERE id = p_wallet_id
  FOR UPDATE;

  IF NOT FOUND THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'wallet not found';
  END IF;

  v_after := v_before + p_amount;

  UPDATE public.user_wallets
  SET balance = v_after,
      total_topped_up = COALESCE(total_topped_up, 0) + p_amount,
      updated_at = now()
  WHERE id = p_wallet_id;

  INSERT INTO public.wallet_transactions (
    wallet_id,
    wallet_type,
    type,
    amount,
    balance_before,
    balance_after,
    description,
    status,
    metadata
  ) VALUES (
    p_wallet_id,
    'user',
    'top_up',
    p_amount,
    v_before,
    v_after,
    p_description,
    'completed',
    jsonb_build_object('admin_email', p_admin_email)
  );
END;
$function$

{"oid": "25392", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.broadcast_trip_offers_by_area(p_trip_id uuid, p_pickup_lat double precision, p_pickup_lng double precision, p_vehicle_type text, p_radius_meters double precision DEFAULT 5000)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_area_id        uuid;
  v_count          int := 0;
  v_driver         record;
  v_pickup         geometry;
BEGIN
  v_pickup  := ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(p_pickup_lng, p_pickup_lat), 4326);
  v_area_id := resolve_service_area(p_pickup_lat, p_pickup_lng);

  -- Update trip's service area if not set
  UPDATE public.trips SET service_area_id = v_area_id WHERE id = p_trip_id AND service_area_id IS NULL;

  FOR v_driver IN
    SELECT dp.id AS driver_id
    FROM public.drivers_profile dp
    WHERE dp.is_available = true
      AND dp.is_verified  = true
      AND lower(dp.vehicle_type) = lower(p_vehicle_type)
      AND dp.current_lat IS NOT NULL
      AND dp.current_lng IS NOT NULL
      -- Route isolation: driver must be assigned to this area
      AND (v_area_id IS NULL OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM driver_service_areas dsa
        WHERE dsa.driver_id = dp.id
          AND dsa.service_area_id = v_area_id
          AND dsa.is_active = true
      ))
      -- Distance filter
      AND ST_DWithin(
        ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(dp.current_lng, dp.current_lat), 4326)::geography,
        v_pickup::geography,
        p_radius_meters
      )
      -- No duplicate offers
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM trip_offers WHERE trip_id = p_trip_id AND driver_id = dp.id
      )
      -- Driver not on active trip
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM trips t
        WHERE t.driver_id = dp.id AND t.status IN ('accepted','arrived','in_progress')
      )
    ORDER BY ST_Distance(
      ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(dp.current_lng, dp.current_lat), 4326)::geography,
      v_pickup::geography
    )
    LIMIT 20
  LOOP
    INSERT INTO public.trip_offers (trip_id, driver_id, status)
    VALUES (p_trip_id, v_driver.driver_id, 'pending')
    ON CONFLICT (trip_id, driver_id) DO NOTHING;
    v_count := v_count + 1;
  END LOOP;

  RETURN json_build_object(
    'success', true,
    'trip_id', p_trip_id,
    'service_area_id', v_area_id,
    'offers_created', v_count
  );
END;
$function$
", "language": "plpgsql", "arguments": "p_trip_id uuid, p_pickup_lat double precision, p_pickup_lng double precision, p_vehicle_type text, p_radius_meters double precision DEFAULT 5000", "truncated": false, "body_chars": 2287, "is_trigger": false, "return_type": "json", "is_trigger_function": false}

{"oid": "20722", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.cleanup_stale_trips()
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_count INTEGER;
BEGIN
  WITH expired AS (
    UPDATE trips
    SET status = 'cancelled',
        cancelled_at = NOW(),
        updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE status = 'searching'
      AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
    RETURNING id
  )
  SELECT COUNT(*) INTO v_count FROM expired;

  RETURN v_count;
END;
$function$

{"oid": "20842", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.cleanup_stuck_trips()
 RETURNS integer
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_count INTEGER;
BEGIN
  -- Cancel searching trips older than 30 minutes
  WITH expired_searching AS (
    UPDATE trips
    SET status = 'cancelled',
        cancelled_at = NOW(),
        updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE status = 'searching'
      AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
    RETURNING id
  ),
  -- Cancel in_progress trips older than 24 hours (stuck)
  expired_inprogress AS (
    UPDATE trips
    SET status = 'cancelled',
        cancelled_at = NOW(),
        updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE status = 'in_progress'
      AND (started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
           OR (started_at IS NULL AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'))
    RETURNING id
  )
  SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM expired_searching) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM expired_inprogress)
  INTO v_count;

  RETURN v_count;
END;
$function$
", "language": "plpgsql", "arguments": "", "truncated": false, "body_chars": 974, "is_trigger": false, "return_type": "integer", "is_trigger_function": false}

{"oid": "20841", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.create_driver_account(p_user_id uuid, p_name text, p_email text, p_phone text, p_national_id text, p_license_number text, p_vehicle_type text, p_vehicle_brand text, p_vehicle_model text, p_vehicle_year text, p_vehicle_color text, p_vehicle_plate text, p_national_id_image text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_license_image text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_criminal_record_image text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_vehicle_image text DEFAULT NULL::text)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  -- Step 1: Create/update user record
  INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, phone, role, created_at, updated_at)
  VALUES (p_user_id, p_name, p_email, p_phone, 'driver', NOW(), NOW())
  ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
    name = EXCLUDED.name,
    phone = EXCLUDED.phone,
    role = 'driver',
    updated_at = NOW();

  -- Step 2: Create driver profile (atomic ‚ÄĒ same transaction)
  INSERT INTO drivers_profile (
    id, national_id, license_number,
    vehicle_type, vehicle_brand, vehicle_model,
    vehicle_year, vehicle_color, vehicle_plate,
    national_id_image, license_image,
    criminal_record_image, vehicle_image,
    is_verified, is_available,
    created_at, updated_at
  ) VALUES (
    p_user_id, p_national_id, p_license_number,
    p_vehicle_type, p_vehicle_brand, p_vehicle_model,
    p_vehicle_year, p_vehicle_color, p_vehicle_plate,
    p_national_id_image, p_license_image,
    p_criminal_record_image, p_vehicle_image,
    false, false,
    NOW(), NOW()
  )
  ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
    national_id = EXCLUDED.national_id,
    license_number = EXCLUDED.license_number,
    vehicle_type = EXCLUDED.vehicle_type,
    vehicle_brand = EXCLUDED.vehicle_brand,
    vehicle_model = EXCLUDED.vehicle_model,
    vehicle_year = EXCLUDED.vehicle_year,
    vehicle_color = EXCLUDED.vehicle_color,
    vehicle_plate = EXCLUDED.vehicle_plate,
    updated_at = NOW();

  RETURN jsonb_build_object('success', true);

EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
  -- If anything fails, the transaction rolls back automatically
  RETURN jsonb_build_object('success', false, 'error', SQLERRM);
END;
$function$
", "language": "plpgsql", "arguments": "p_user_id uuid, p_name text, p_email text, p_phone text, p_national_id text, p_license_number text, p_vehicle_type text, p_vehicle_brand text, p_vehicle_model text, p_vehicle_year text, p_vehicle_color text, p_vehicle_plate text, p_national_id_image text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_license_image text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_criminal_record_image text DEFAULT NULL::text, p_vehicle_image text DEFAULT NULL::text", "truncated": false, "body_chars": 2137, "is_trigger": false, "return_type": "jsonb", "is_trigger_function": false}

 RETURNS trigger

AS $function$
BEGIN
  -- When trip is accepted/completed/cancelled, expire all pending offers
  IF NEW.status IN ('accepted', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled')
     AND OLD.status = 'searching' THEN
    UPDATE trip_offers
    SET status = 'expired',
        updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE trip_id = NEW.id
      AND status = 'pending';
  END IF;
  RETURN NEW;
END;

{"oid": "25241", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_auto_deactivate_expired_coupons()
 RETURNS TABLE(coupon_id uuid, coupon_code character varying, reason text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- Deactivate expired coupons
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH expired AS (
        UPDATE coupons
        SET is_active = false
        WHERE is_active = true
          AND expires_at IS NOT NULL
          AND expires_at < now()
        RETURNING id, code
    )
    INSERT INTO coupon_audit_log (coupon_id, event_type, details)
    SELECT 
        e.id,
        'expired',
        jsonb_build_object(
            'reason', 'Coupon expired automatically',
            'expired_at', now()::text
        )
    FROM expired e
    RETURNING 
        coupon_audit_log.coupon_id,
        (SELECT c.code FROM coupons c WHERE c.id = coupon_audit_log.coupon_id),
        'expired'::text;

    -- Deactivate budget-exhausted coupons (safety net)
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH budget_exhausted AS (
        UPDATE coupons
        SET is_active = false
        WHERE is_active = true
          AND budget_limit IS NOT NULL
          AND spent_budget >= budget_limit
        RETURNING id, code
    )
    INSERT INTO coupon_audit_log (coupon_id, event_type, details)
    SELECT 
        be.id,
        'budget_exhausted',
        jsonb_build_object(
            'reason', 'Budget fully consumed',
            'budget_limit', (SELECT budget_limit FROM coupons WHERE id = be.id),
            'spent_budget', (SELECT spent_budget FROM coupons WHERE id = be.id)
        )
    FROM budget_exhausted be
    RETURNING 
        coupon_audit_log.coupon_id,
        (SELECT c.code FROM coupons c WHERE c.id = coupon_audit_log.coupon_id),
        'budget_exhausted'::text;

    -- Deactivate max-uses-reached coupons (safety net)
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH max_reached AS (
        UPDATE coupons
        SET is_active = false
        WHERE is_active = true
          AND max_uses IS NOT NULL
          AND used_count >= max_uses
        RETURNING id, code
    )
    INSERT INTO coupon_audit_log (coupon_id, event_type, details)
    SELECT 
        mr.id,
        'max_uses_reached',
        jsonb_build_object(
            'reason', 'Max usage limit reached',
            'max_uses', (SELECT max_uses FROM coupons WHERE id = mr.id),
            'used_count', (SELECT used_count FROM coupons WHERE id = mr.id)
        )
    FROM max_reached mr
    RETURNING 
        coupon_audit_log.coupon_id,
        (SELECT c.code FROM coupons c WHERE c.id = coupon_audit_log.coupon_id),
        'max_uses_reached'::text;
END;
$function$

{"oid": "25242", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_check_coupon_budget_alerts(p_threshold_pct numeric DEFAULT 80)
 RETURNS TABLE(coupon_id uuid, coupon_code character varying, budget_limit numeric, spent_budget numeric, usage_pct numeric, alert_level text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
        c.id,
        c.code,
        c.budget_limit,
        c.spent_budget,
        ROUND((c.spent_budget / c.budget_limit) * 100, 1) AS usage_pct,
        CASE
            WHEN c.spent_budget >= c.budget_limit THEN 'exhausted'
            WHEN (c.spent_budget / c.budget_limit) * 100 >= 95 THEN 'critical'
            WHEN (c.spent_budget / c.budget_limit) * 100 >= p_threshold_pct THEN 'warning'
            ELSE 'ok'
        END AS alert_level
    FROM coupons c
    WHERE c.budget_limit IS NOT NULL
      AND c.budget_limit > 0
      AND (c.spent_budget / c.budget_limit) * 100 >= p_threshold_pct
    ORDER BY usage_pct DESC;
END;
$function$
", "language": "plpgsql", "arguments": "p_threshold_pct numeric DEFAULT 80", "truncated": false, "body_chars": 1004, "is_trigger": false, "return_type": "TABLE(coupon_id uuid, coupon_code character varying, budget_limit numeric, spent_budget numeric, usage_pct numeric, alert_level text)", "is_trigger_function": false}

{"oid": "25249", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_coupon_usage_timeline(p_coupon_id uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(usage_date date, usage_count bigint, total_discount numeric, unique_users bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
        DATE(cu.created_at) AS usage_date,
        COUNT(*) AS usage_count,
        SUM(cu.discount_amount) AS total_discount,
        COUNT(DISTINCT uc.user_id) AS unique_users
    FROM coupon_usages cu
    JOIN user_coupons uc ON uc.id = cu.user_coupon_id
    WHERE uc.coupon_id = p_coupon_id
    GROUP BY DATE(cu.created_at)
    ORDER BY usage_date DESC
    LIMIT 90; -- last 90 days
END;
$function$

 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
    IF NEW.status = 'active' AND (OLD.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'active') THEN
        UPDATE public.trip_route_plans
        SET status = 'inactive', updated_at = now()
        WHERE trip_id = NEW.trip_id
          AND id != NEW.id
          AND status = 'active';
    END IF;
    RETURN NEW;
END;

{"oid": "25243", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_log_coupon_status_change()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- Log when is_active changes
    IF OLD.is_active IS DISTINCT FROM NEW.is_active THEN
        INSERT INTO coupon_audit_log (coupon_id, event_type, details)
        VALUES (
            NEW.id,
            CASE WHEN NEW.is_active THEN 'activated' ELSE 'deactivated' END,
            jsonb_build_object(
                'previous_state', OLD.is_active,
                'new_state', NEW.is_active,
                'used_count', NEW.used_count,
                'spent_budget', COALESCE(NEW.spent_budget, 0),
                'budget_limit', NEW.budget_limit,
                'max_uses', NEW.max_uses
            )
        );
    END IF;

    -- Log budget milestone at 80%
    IF NEW.budget_limit IS NOT NULL 
       AND NEW.budget_limit > 0
       AND COALESCE(NEW.spent_budget, 0) >= NEW.budget_limit * 0.8
       AND COALESCE(OLD.spent_budget, 0) < NEW.budget_limit * 0.8 THEN
        INSERT INTO coupon_audit_log (coupon_id, event_type, details)
        VALUES (
            NEW.id,
            'budget_warning',
            jsonb_build_object(
                'message', 'Budget usage exceeded 80%',
                'budget_limit', NEW.budget_limit,
                'spent_budget', NEW.spent_budget,
                'usage_pct', ROUND((NEW.spent_budget / NEW.budget_limit) * 100, 1)
            )
        );
    END IF;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$
", "language": "plpgsql", "arguments": "", "truncated": false, "body_chars": 1477, "is_trigger": true, "return_type": "trigger", "is_trigger_function": true}

{"oid": "20222", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_admin_dashboard_stats()
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_result JSON;
BEGIN
  SELECT json_build_object(
    'total_users',       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'user'),
    'total_drivers',     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'driver'),
    'verified_drivers',  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drivers_profile WHERE is_verified = true),
    'available_drivers', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drivers_profile WHERE is_available = true),
    'total_trips',       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trips),
    'active_trips',      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trips WHERE status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled','no_drivers')),
    'completed_trips',   (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trips WHERE status = 'completed'),
    'total_revenue',     (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(price),0) FROM trips WHERE status = 'completed'),
    'revenue_today',     (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(price),0) FROM trips WHERE status = 'completed' AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE),
    'trips_today',       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trips WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE),
    'unread_notifications', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE is_read = false)
  ) INTO v_result;

  RETURN v_result;
END;
$function$

{"oid": "21735", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_driver_earnings_summary(p_driver_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(driver_id uuid, available_balance numeric, total_earnings numeric, total_withdrawn numeric, pending_withdrawal numeric, commission_rate numeric, completed_trips bigint, earnings_30d numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'auth'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  v_caller_id   UUID    := auth.uid();
  v_is_admin    BOOLEAN := is_admin_user();
  v_is_driver   BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
  -- ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ ōßŔĄō™ō≠ŔāŔā ōßŔĄō£ŔąŔĄ: ŔáŔĄ ōßŔĄŔÖō≥ō™ōģōĮŔÖ ŔÖō≥ō¨ŔĎŔĄ ōßŔĄōĮōģŔąŔĄōü ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ
  IF v_caller_id IS NULL THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'Unauthorized: Not authenticated'
      USING ERRCODE = '42501';
  END IF;

  -- ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ ōßŔĄō™ō≠ŔāŔā ōßŔĄōęōßŔÜŔä: ŔáŔĄ ōßŔĄŔÖō≥ō™ōģōĮŔÖ ō≥ŔąōßŔāōü ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ
  -- ŔÜō™ō≠ŔāŔā ŔÖŔÜ drivers_profile ŔÖōī users.role ŔĀŔāō∑
  -- ŔĄō£ŔÜ drivers_profile ŔáŔą ōßŔĄŔÖōĶōĮōĪ ōßŔĄō≠ŔāŔäŔāŔä ŔĄŔĄō®ŔäōßŔÜōßō™ ōßŔĄŔÖō∑ŔĄŔąō®ō©
  SELECT EXISTS(
    SELECT 1 FROM drivers_profile WHERE id = v_caller_id
  ) INTO v_is_driver;

  -- ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ ŔÖŔÜō∑Ŕā ōßŔĄŔąōĶŔąŔĄ ōßŔĄōĶōĪŔäō≠ ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ
  --
  --  | ōßŔĄōĮŔąōĪ        | p_driver_id = NULL | p_driver_id ŔÖō≠ōĮōĮ         |
  --  |‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ|‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ|‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ---|
  --  | ō£ōĮŔÖŔÜ         | ŔäōĪō¨ōĻ ōßŔĄŔÉŔĄ          | ŔäōĪō¨ōĻ driver ŔÖō≠ōĮōĮ         |
  --  | ō≥ŔąōßŔā         | ŔäōĪō¨ōĻ ŔÜŔĀō≥Ŕá          | ŔĄŔą ŔÖō∑ōßō®Ŕā ŔĄŔÜŔĀō≥Ŕá ‚Üí ŔäōĪō¨ōĻ   |
  --  |              |                    | ŔĄŔą ŔÖōģō™ŔĄŔĀ ‚Üí ŔÖōĪŔĀŔąō∂         |
  --  | ō®ōßō≥ŔÜō¨ōĪ/super | ŔÖōĪŔĀŔąō∂              | ŔÖōĪŔĀŔąō∂                    |
  --  | anon         | ŔÖōĪŔĀŔąō∂ (NULL uid)   | ŔÖōĪŔĀŔąō∂ (NULL uid)         |

  IF NOT v_is_admin AND NOT v_is_driver THEN
    -- ōßŔĄŔÖō≥ō™ōģōĮŔÖ ŔÖōī ō£ōĮŔÖŔÜ ŔąŔÖōī ō≥ŔąōßŔā ‚Üí ŔÖōī ŔÖŔÜ ō≠ŔāŔá ŔäōīŔąŔĀ ō®ŔäōßŔÜōßō™ ōßŔĄō≥ŔąōßŔāŔäŔÜ
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'Forbidden: Driver earnings data is restricted'
      USING ERRCODE = '42501';
  END IF;

  -- ōßŔĄō≥ŔąōßŔā ōßŔĄōĻōßōĮŔä Ŕäō≠ōßŔąŔĄ ŔäōīŔąŔĀ ō®ŔäōßŔÜōßō™ ō≥ŔąōßŔā ō™ōßŔÜŔä
  IF NOT v_is_admin AND p_driver_id IS NOT NULL
                    AND p_driver_id != v_caller_id THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'Forbidden: Cannot access another driver earnings'
      USING ERRCODE = '42501';
  END IF;

  -- ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ ōßŔĄōßō≥ō™ōĻŔĄōßŔÖ ōßŔĄŔĀōĻŔĄŔä ō®ōĻōĮ ōßŔĄō™ō≠ŔāŔā ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ
  --
  --  FIX BUG #4: ōßŔĄō£ŔāŔąōßō≥ ōĶōĪŔäō≠ō© ‚ÄĒ AND ō£ŔāŔąŔČ ŔÖŔÜ OR ŔĀŔä PostgreSQL
  --  ōßŔĄōĶŔäōļō© ōßŔĄŔāōĮŔäŔÖō© ōßŔĄōģōßō∑ō¶ō© ŔÉōßŔÜō™:
  --    WHERE (v_is_admin) OR (dp.id = v_caller_id) AND (filter)
  --  = WHERE (v_is_admin) OR ((dp.id = v_caller_id) AND (filter))
  --  ŔäōĻŔÜŔä ōßŔĄō£ōĮŔÖŔÜ ŔÖōß ō®Ŕäō∑ō®Ŕāōī ŔĀŔĄō™ōĪ p_driver_id ō£ō®ōĮōßŔč ‚Üź Bug!
  --
  --  ōßŔĄōĶŔäōļō© ōßŔĄōĶō≠Ŕäō≠ō© ō£ōĮŔÜōßŔá: ŔÉŔĄ ō≠ōßŔĄō© ō®ŔäŔÜ ō£ŔāŔąōßō≥ ŔÖō≥ō™ŔāŔĄō©

  RETURN QUERY
  SELECT
    dp.id                                                         AS driver_id,
    COALESCE(dw.balance,            0::NUMERIC)                   AS available_balance,
    COALESCE(dw.total_earned,       0::NUMERIC)                   AS total_earnings,
    COALESCE(dw.total_withdrawn,    0::NUMERIC)                   AS total_withdrawn,
    COALESCE(dw.pending_withdrawal, 0::NUMERIC)                   AS pending_withdrawal,
    COALESCE(dw.commission_rate,    0.15::NUMERIC)                AS commission_rate,
    COUNT(t.id) FILTER (
      WHERE t.status = 'completed'
    )::BIGINT                                                     AS completed_trips,
    COALESCE(
      SUM(t.driver_earnings) FILTER (
        WHERE t.status = 'completed'
          AND t.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
      ),
      0::NUMERIC
    )                                                             AS earnings_30d

  FROM drivers_profile dp
  LEFT JOIN driver_wallets dw ON dw.id = dp.id
  LEFT JOIN trips          t  ON t.driver_id = dp.id

  WHERE
    -- ‚úÖ ōßŔĄō£ōĮŔÖŔÜ: ŔäōīŔąŔĀ ōßŔĄŔÉŔĄ ō£Ŕą driver ŔÖō≠ōĮōĮ (FIX: p_driver_id ŔäŔŹō∑ō®ŔéŔĎŔā ŔĄŔĄō£ōĮŔÖŔÜ ŔÉŔÖōßŔÜ)
    (
      v_is_admin = TRUE
      AND (p_driver_id IS NULL OR dp.id = p_driver_id)
    )
    OR
    -- ‚úÖ ōßŔĄō≥ŔąōßŔā: ŔäōīŔąŔĀ ŔÜŔĀō≥Ŕá ŔĀŔāō∑ (p_driver_id ō™ŔÖ ōßŔĄō™ō≠ŔāŔā ŔÖŔÜŔá ō£ōĻŔĄōßŔá)
    (
      v_is_admin = FALSE
      AND v_is_driver = TRUE
      AND dp.id = v_caller_id
    )

  GROUP BY
    dp.id,
    dw.balance,
    dw.total_earned,
    dw.total_withdrawn,
    dw.pending_withdrawal,
    dw.commission_rate;

END;
$function$
", "language": "plpgsql", "arguments": "p_driver_id uuid DEFAULT NULL::uuid", "truncated": false, "body_chars": 4026, "is_trigger": false, "return_type": "TABLE(driver_id uuid, available_balance numeric, total_earnings numeric, total_withdrawn numeric, pending_withdrawal numeric, commission_rate numeric, completed_trips bigint, earnings_30d numeric)", "is_trigger_function": false}

{"oid": "20227", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_nearby_drivers(p_geohash_prefix character varying, p_vehicle_type character varying)
 RETURNS TABLE(driver_id uuid, lat numeric, lng numeric, heading numeric, name character varying, rating numeric, total_trips integer, vehicle_type character varying, vehicle_brand character varying, vehicle_model character varying, vehicle_color character varying, vehicle_plate character varying)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  SELECT
    dl.driver_id,
    dl.lat,
    dl.lng,
    dl.heading,
    u.name,
    u.rating,
    u.total_trips,
    dp.vehicle_type,
    dp.vehicle_brand,
    dp.vehicle_model,
    dp.vehicle_color,
    dp.vehicle_plate
  FROM   driver_locations dl
  JOIN   drivers_profile  dp ON dp.id = dl.driver_id
  JOIN   users            u  ON u.id  = dl.driver_id
  WHERE  dp.is_verified  = true
  AND    dp.is_available = true
  AND    u.is_active     = true
  AND    dp.vehicle_type = p_vehicle_type
  AND    dl.geohash LIKE p_geohash_prefix || '%'
  AND    dl.updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'  -- only fresh locations
  ORDER  BY dl.updated_at DESC;
END;
$function$

{"oid": "25013", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_nearby_drivers_secure(user_lat double precision, user_lng double precision, radius_meters double precision DEFAULT 5000)
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, lat double precision, lng double precision, distance_meters double precision)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
        up.user_id as id,
        up.lat,
        up.lng,
        ( 6371000 * acos( cos( radians(user_lat) ) * cos( radians( up.lat ) ) * cos( radians( up.lng ) - radians(user_lng) ) + sin( radians(user_lat) ) * sin( radians( up.lat ) ) ) ) AS distance_meters
    FROM user_presence up
    JOIN drivers_profile dp ON up.user_id = dp.id
    JOIN users u ON up.user_id = u.id
    WHERE up.is_online = true
      AND dp.is_verified = true
      AND u.is_active = true
      AND up.updated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
      AND ( 6371000 * acos( cos( radians(user_lat) ) * cos( radians( up.lat ) ) * cos( radians( up.lng ) - radians(user_lng) ) + sin( radians(user_lat) ) * sin( radians( up.lat ) ) ) ) <= radius_meters;
END;
$function$

{"oid": "21616", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_unread_message_count(p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(other_user_id uuid, unread_count bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER

  SELECT sender_id, COUNT(*)::bigint
  FROM public.messages
  WHERE receiver_id = p_user_id AND is_read = false AND trip_id IS NULL

{"oid": "21657", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_user_conversations(p_user_id uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(other_user_id uuid, other_user_name text, other_user_avatar text, other_user_role text, last_message text, last_message_at timestamp with time zone, is_me_sender boolean, is_read boolean, unread_count bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
  -- Avoid variable name collision with column names
  v_other_user_id uuid;
  v_other_user_name text;
  v_other_user_avatar text;
  v_other_user_role text;
  v_last_message text;
  v_last_message_at timestamptz;
  v_is_me_sender boolean;
  v_is_read boolean;
  v_unread_count bigint;
BEGIN
  -- Use explicit table aliases and qualify ALL column references
  RETURN QUERY
  WITH latest_messages AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (CASE
      WHEN m.sender_id = p_user_id THEN m.receiver_id
      ELSE m.sender_id
    END)
      CASE
        WHEN m.sender_id = p_user_id THEN m.receiver_id
        ELSE m.sender_id
      END AS other_id,
      m.content AS last_msg,
      m.created_at AS msg_time,
      (m.sender_id = p_user_id) AS me_sender,
      m.is_read AS msg_read,
      m.sender_id AS sender_id,
      m.receiver_id AS receiver_id
    FROM messages m
    WHERE (m.sender_id = p_user_id OR m.receiver_id = p_user_id)
      AND (
        (m.sender_id = p_user_id AND m.deleted_by_sender = false) OR
        (m.receiver_id = p_user_id AND m.deleted_by_receiver = false)
      )
    ORDER BY
      CASE
        WHEN m.sender_id = p_user_id THEN m.receiver_id
        ELSE m.sender_id
      END,
      m.created_at DESC
  ),
  unread_counts AS (
    SELECT
      m.sender_id AS from_user,
      COUNT(*) AS unread
    FROM messages m
    WHERE m.receiver_id = p_user_id
      AND m.is_read = false
      AND m.deleted_by_receiver = false
    GROUP BY m.sender_id
  )
  SELECT
    lm.other_id,
    u.name::text,
    u.avatar_url::text,
    u.role::text,
    lm.last_msg::text,
    lm.msg_time,
    lm.me_sender,
    CASE
      WHEN lm.me_sender THEN true
      ELSE lm.msg_read
    END,
    COALESCE(uc.unread, 0)
  FROM latest_messages lm
  JOIN users u ON u.id = lm.other_id
  LEFT JOIN unread_counts uc ON uc.from_user = lm.other_id
  ORDER BY lm.msg_time DESC;
END;
$function$
", "language": "plpgsql", "arguments": "p_user_id uuid", "truncated": false, "body_chars": 2261, "is_trigger": false, "return_type": "TABLE(other_user_id uuid, other_user_name text, other_user_avatar text, other_user_role text, last_message text, last_message_at timestamp with time zone, is_me_sender boolean, is_read boolean, unread_count bigint)", "is_trigger_function": false}

 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
  IF NEW.status = 'accepted' AND OLD.status = 'searching' THEN
    UPDATE trip_offers
    SET status = 'rejected', responded_at = NOW()
    WHERE trip_id = NEW.id
      AND status = 'pending'
      AND driver_id IS DISTINCT FROM NEW.driver_id;
  END IF;
  RETURN NEW;
END;

{"oid": "25222", "source": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.reverse_coupon_on_cancel(p_trip_id uuid)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_usage RECORD;
BEGIN
    -- Find the usage record for this trip
    SELECT cu.*, uc.coupon_id, uc.user_id
    INTO v_usage
    FROM coupon_usages cu
    JOIN user_coupons uc ON uc.id = cu.user_coupon_id
    WHERE cu.trip_id = p_trip_id;

    IF v_usage IS NULL THEN
        RETURN jsonb_build_object('success', true, 'reversed', false);
    END IF;

    -- 1. Restore user_coupons.is_used = false
    UPDATE user_coupons
    SET is_used = false, used_at = NULL
    WHERE id = v_usage.user_coupon_id;

    -- 2. Decrement global counter + restore budget
    UPDATE coupons
    SET used_count = GREATEST(used_count - 1, 0),
        spent_budget = GREATEST(COALESCE(spent_budget, 0) - v_usage.discount_amount, 0),
        -- Re-activate if budget is now below limit
        is_active = CASE
            WHEN budget_limit IS NOT NULL AND GREATEST(COALESCE(spent_budget, 0) - v_usage.discount_amount, 0) < budget_limit THEN true
            WHEN max_uses IS NOT NULL AND GREATEST(used_count - 1, 0) < max_uses THEN true
            ELSE is_active
        END
    WHERE id = v_usage.coupon_id;

    -- 3. Remove usage record
    DELETE FROM coupon_usages WHERE trip_id = p_trip_id;

    -- 4. Reset trip coupon fields
    UPDATE trips
    SET coupon_discount = 0,
        final_price = price
    WHERE id = p_trip_id;

    RETURN jsonb_build_object(
        'success', true,
        'reversed', true,
        'restored_discount', v_usage.discount_amount
    );
END;
$function$
", "language": "plpgsql", "arguments": "p_trip_id uuid", "truncated": false, "body_chars": 1653, "is_trigger": false, "return_type": "jsonb", "is_trigger_function": false}

details:
{"event": "sql_drop", "owner": "supabase_admin", "enabled": "ENABLED", "function": "set_graphql_placeholder", "filter_tags": ["DROP EXTENSION"], "function_body_preview": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION extensions.set_graphql_placeholder()
 RETURNS event_trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
    DECLARE
    graphql_is_dropped bool;
    BEGIN
    graphql_is_dropped = (
        SELECT ev.schema_name = 'graphql_public'
        FROM pg_event_trigger_dropped_objects() AS ev
        WHERE ev.schema_name = 'graphql_public'
    );

    IF graphql_is_dropped
    THEN
        c"}

name: ddl_command_end
details:
{"event": "ddl_command_end", "owner": "supabase_admin", "enabled": "ENABLED", "function": "grant_pg_cron_access", "filter_tags": ["CREATE EXTENSION"], "function_body_preview": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION extensions.grant_pg_cron_access()
 RETURNS event_trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  IF EXISTS (
    SELECT
    FROM pg_event_trigger_ddl_commands() AS ev
    JOIN pg_extension AS ext
    ON ev.objid = ext.oid
    WHERE ext.extname = 'pg_cron'
  )
  THEN
    grant usage on schema cron to postgres with grant option;

    alter default privileges in schema cron"}

name: ddl_command_end
details:
{"event": "ddl_command_end", "owner": "supabase_admin", "enabled": "ENABLED", "function": "grant_pg_graphql_access", "filter_tags": ["CREATE FUNCTION"], "function_body_preview": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION extensions.grant_pg_graphql_access()
 RETURNS event_trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    func_is_graphql_resolve bool;
BEGIN
    func_is_graphql_resolve = (
        SELECT n.proname = 'resolve'
        FROM pg_event_trigger_ddl_commands() AS ev
        LEFT JOIN pg_catalog.pg_proc AS n
        ON ev.objid = n.oid
    );

    IF func_is_graphql_resolve
    "}

name: ddl_command_end
details:
{"event": "ddl_command_end", "owner": "supabase_admin", "enabled": "ENABLED", "function": "grant_pg_net_access", "filter_tags": ["CREATE EXTENSION"], "function_body_preview": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION extensions.grant_pg_net_access()
 RETURNS event_trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  IF EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM pg_event_trigger_ddl_commands() AS ev
    JOIN pg_extension AS ext
    ON ev.objid = ext.oid
    WHERE ext.extname = 'pg_net'
  )
  THEN
    IF NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM pg_roles
      WHERE rolname = 'supabase_functions_admin'
  "}

name: ddl_command_end
details:
{"event": "ddl_command_end", "owner": "supabase_admin", "enabled": "ENABLED", "function": "pgrst_ddl_watch", "filter_tags": "ALL", "function_body_preview": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION extensions.pgrst_ddl_watch()
 RETURNS event_trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
  cmd record;
BEGIN
  FOR cmd IN SELECT * FROM pg_event_trigger_ddl_commands()
  LOOP
    IF cmd.command_tag IN (
      'CREATE SCHEMA', 'ALTER SCHEMA'
    , 'CREATE TABLE', 'CREATE TABLE AS', 'SELECT INTO', 'ALTER TABLE'
    , 'CREATE FOREIGN TABLE', 'ALTER FOREIGN TABLE'
    , '"}

{"event": "sql_drop", "owner": "supabase_admin", "enabled": "ENABLED", "function": "pgrst_drop_watch", "filter_tags": "ALL", "function_body_preview": "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION extensions.pgrst_drop_watch()
 RETURNS event_trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
  obj record;
BEGIN
  FOR obj IN SELECT * FROM pg_event_trigger_dropped_objects()
  LOOP
    IF obj.object_type IN (
      'schema'
    , 'table'
    , 'foreign table'
    , 'view'
    , 'materialized view'
    , 'function'
    , 'trigger'
    , 'type'
    , 'rule'
    )
    AND "}
